log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Kor — Bardic Musician.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Kor — Bardic Musician.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:7+3=10 vs AC 14] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Kor — Bardic Musician.
→ Kor — Bardic Musician: DEX save [d20:11+6=17 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Kor — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):16+1=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):17+1=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):10+1=11 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):10+1=11 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Kor — Bardic Musician: SUCCESS. 12 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
